summary: ANDROID | Log In - When user is Logged out button does not work but user is Logged out
scenario: User taps Log Out button, UI freezes and does not update to show Log In button until re-entering Account tab
description_clean: When the user taps the Log Out button, the button does not respond visually (UI freeze), but the user is actually logged out. The correct behavior (Log In button) only appears after re-entering the Account tab. This is a UI-only issue where the button state does not update after logout.
steps: 1. Open the app and navigate to the Account tab.
3. Observe the visual response of the Log Out button after tapping.
4. Check if the user is logged out by attempting to access account features.
5. Navigate away from the Account tab and then re-enter it.
6. Observe the button state upon re-entering the Account tab.
expected: When the user taps the Log Out button, the button should immediately update visually (e.g., change to a Log In button) to reflect the logged-out state without needing to leave and re-enter the Account tab.
actual: When the user taps the Log Out button, the button does not respond visually (UI freeze), but the user is actually logged out. The correct behavior (Log In button) only appears after re-entering the Account tab.
